"[14] ^1039 CT631-1, CPZ LINE 6, WILL CALL HIS SUPV and WILL BE ENRT W/ SIGNS"

"[12] PER HECTOR TAMAYO WILL NOTIFY ONCALL CPZ LINE 6 - WILL RECALL W/ ETA"

"[6] PER ICSO ** CLOSURE ON HAMMER RD FROM 98 TO ANZA - 98 WILL REMAIN OPEN - ONLY REQ'ING SIGNS** "
